positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest path opening up into a dreamy meadow. The central element is a group of stylized, chunky woodland creatures—a fox, a deer, and a bear—standing together in a joyful, harmonious grouping. Incorporate delicate, swirling botanical elements and bioluminescent mushrooms scattered among the flora. The style should be modern fairytale illustration, combining the clean lines of Nordic design with the rich color palette of Studio Ghibli. Use a restricted, complementary color palette: deep teal, forest green, warm ochre, and creamy cream. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, optimized for apparel print, featuring strong contrast between the subject silhouettes and the background details. High contrast, vector art aesthetic, solid linework, perfect symmetry, volumetric lighting.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor composition, messy, photographic, realism, logo, trademark, celebrity, copyright
